name_cn:
【Imported Leather】Brand New Upgraded Version ✧chan Arrived!!️
Classic Small Flap wallet
Caviar leather Black Gold snap
Flat bills fit directly, with 6 card slots
Multi-functional practical tri-fold wallet
A style praised by Charlene Choi, a must-have for everyone❥
The charm of the brand new upgraded version✧
Counter price is 6300 RMB and often out of stock📈
Those in the know, hurry up and grab it!!
Material: Exclusive cutting ZP Caviar leather
Lining: Exclusive cutting ZP red calf leather
Hardware: Imported zipper, all-steel exquisitely carved gold snap
Specs: 11.5*10.5*3cm
Model: A82288
